hero.headline: Al-Alamiya Cleaning
hero.tagline: Professional home and office cleaning with steam cleaning and pest control.

about.missionBody: We provide a clean, healthy environment through professional cleaning services using modern equipment and safe products, with a strong commitment to punctuality and consistent quality.
about.visionBody: To be the top choice for cleaning services in the region through consistent quality, an excellent customer experience, and a trusted team.

services.sectionLead: Complete care for homes and workplaces — tailored plans and careful execution.

steam.title: Steam cleaning
steam.desc: Deep steam cleaning for homes and offices to remove dirt, grease, and allergens.

pest.title: Pest control
pest.desc: Professional spraying and pest management to keep your space comfortable and safe.

deep.title: Floors, carpets & upholstery
deep.desc: Thorough cleaning of floors, carpets, rugs, and furniture for a refreshed look.

quick.title: Quick & reliable
quick.desc: Flexible scheduling and dependable teams that respect your time and property.

whyUs.sectionLead: Quality you can see — service you can trust.

team.title: Professional team
team.desc: Trained specialists who follow best practices on every job.

eco.title: Eco-friendly products
eco.desc: Safe, effective cleaning materials that are gentle on people and the environment.

punctual.title: On time, every time
punctual.desc: We show up when promised and deliver consistent, high-quality results.

contact.sectionLead: Phone, email, or WhatsApp — we respond quickly.
contact.addressBody: Serving Mecca and nearby areas by arrangement.
